changelog: Polish 12.2.4: Availability picker on /reservation.php. New js/reservation-availability.js hooks the table_label and starts_at fields, debounce-fetches /reservation_availability.php (session-based mirror of api/v1/reservations/availability.php — no bearer needed for guest customers), renders busy ranges as a read-only pill list under the date inputs. Picker is informational; create_reservation.php remains the authoritative slot conflict gate (409 slot_taken).
